query: SELECT participantId, dailyLogId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_events WHERE dailyLogId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY participantId, dailyLogId HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT participantId, dailyLogId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_events WHERE dailyLogId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY participantId, dailyLogId HAVING cnt > 1;
